creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: tota
Date: Sun Jun 30 13:47:07 2013
New Revision: 322085
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/322085

Log:
  - Update to 0.2.2
  - Pet portlint(1)
    * Trim Makefile header
    * Move LICENSE section earlier
  - Transfer maintainership to ruby@
  
  PR:		ports/180008
  Submitted by:	swills

Modified:
  head/www/rubygem-yapra/Makefile
  head/www/rubygem-yapra/distinfo

Modified: head/www/rubygem-yapra/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/rubygem-yapra/Makefile	Sun Jun 30 13:44:49 2013	(r322084)
+++ head/www/rubygem-yapra/Makefile	Sun Jun 30 13:47:07 2013	(r322085)
@@ -1,22 +1,18 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	rubygem-yapra
-# Date created:		2008-07-30
-# Whom:			TAKATSU Tomonari <tota@rtfm.jp>
-#
+# Created by: TAKATSU Tomonari <tota@rtfm.jp>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	yapra
-PORTVERSION=	0.2.0
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.2
 CATEGORIES=	www rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
-MAINTAINER=	tota@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Yet Another Pragger implementation
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-mechanize>=0.7.6:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-mechanize
-
 LICENSE=	MIT
 
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-mechanize>0:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-mechanize
+
 USE_RUBY=	yes
 USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
 RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes

Modified: head/www/rubygem-yapra/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/rubygem-yapra/distinfo	Sun Jun 30 13:44:49 2013	(r322084)
+++ head/www/rubygem-yapra/distinfo	Sun Jun 30 13:47:07 2013	(r322085)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/yapra-0.2.0.gem) = b5436fb4e7a1f2030e674aeed247dd9eaa5f0631e7e8906993fe5254be2f0291
-SIZE (rubygem/yapra-0.2.0.gem) = 44544
+SHA256 (rubygem/yapra-0.2.2.gem) = fc51f0f898e3daa95558f32c232b35c9cc0a9f3c455668f8ba9017578a24acc4
+SIZE (rubygem/yapra-0.2.2.gem) = 43008
